name: refactoring
description: Safe refactoring with analysis, implementation, and test validation

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What the refactoring should achieve (e.g., 'extract shared logic into utilities', 'reduce cyclomatic complexity')

parameters.name: test_command
parameters.description: Command to run tests (defaults to 'pnpm run test')

team.name: architect
team.role: Software architect — plans refactoring strategy with minimal risk and maximum clarity

team.name: implementer
team.role: Implementation specialist — executes refactoring changes while preserving behavior

tasks.title: Plan refactoring of {{module}}
tasks.description: Analyze {{module}} and create a refactoring plan to: {{goal}}. Document: (1) current structure and problems, (2) proposed changes with file:line references, (3) risk assessment — what could break, (4) migration steps in order of safety. Write the plan to refactoring-plan.md.

expectations.criteria: The refactoring plan is thorough, identifies risks, and proposes a safe incremental approach

tasks.title: Refactor {{module}}
tasks.description: Execute the refactoring plan for {{module}} to achieve: {{goal}}. Follow the plan step by step. After each change, verify tests still pass. Do NOT change behavior — only improve structure.

tasks.title: Validate refactoring
tasks.description: Review the refactoring of {{module}}. Verify: (1) the goal was achieved: {{goal}}, (2) no behavior changed, (3) all tests pass, (4) code is cleaner and more maintainable than before.

expectations.criteria: The refactoring achieves the stated goal without changing behavior, and the code is measurably improved
